ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "pregnant" INTEGER /* Number of times the patient has been pregnant */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "family_history_diabetes" INTEGER /* Whether the patient has a family history of diabetes */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status of the patient (e.g., current, former, never) */,
  "physical_activity_level" TEXT /* Physical activity level of the patient (e.g., low, moderate, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the health metric record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient related to these metrics */,
  "plasma_glucose" REAL /* Plasma glucose level of the patient */,
  "blood_pressure" REAL /* Diastolic blood pressure of the patient */,
  "skin_fold_thickness" REAL /* Triceps skin fold thickness of the patient */,
  "serum_insulin" REAL /* 2-Hour serum insulin level of the patient */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body mass index of the patient */,
  "diabetes_pedigree_function" REAL /* Diabetes pedigree function score of the patient */,
  "waist_circumference" REAL /* Waist circumference of the patient */,
  "hip_circumference" REAL /* Hip circumference of the patient */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diabetes_risk_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the diabetes risk score record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient related to this score */,
  "risk_score" REAL /* Calculated risk score for diabetes */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the risk assessment */,
  "interpreter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the healthcare provider who interpreted the results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diabetes_risk_scores_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diabetes_risk_scores_interpreter_id FOREIGN KEY ("interpreter_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient for this appointment */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the doctor handling the appointment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments regarding the appointment */,
  "appointment_status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., scheduled, completed, missed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doctors" (
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each doctor */,
  "doctor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the doctor */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the doctor */,
  "hospital_affiliation" TEXT /* Hospital affiliation of the doctor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labs" (
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab */,
  "lab_name" TEXT /* Name of the laboratory */,
  "lab_location" TEXT /* Location of the laboratory */,
  "lab_certification" TEXT /* Certification of the laboratory (e.g., CAP, CLIA) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab test */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient who underwent the test */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lab where the test was conducted */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date of the lab test */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of the lab test performed */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the lab test */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the test results (e.g., normal, abnormal, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_tests_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES labs ("lab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_tests_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, healthcare provider) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., endocrinology, lab) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, data retrieval) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of access (e.g., hospital, remote) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the research study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "study_description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the study (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research study */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient participating in the study */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment in the study */,
  "withdrawal_date" TEXT /* Date of withdrawal from the study (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_participants_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES research_studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_participants_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
